name: CopyWizard
description: Concept stage, part of the Wizard suite. Bridges mismatched field names across forms (name vs first_name vs fullname) using local profiles and mappings — privacy-first, HIPAA-aware. Target users: healthcare (Practice Fusion EHR), recruiters, QA testers, sales. Launch free, add Pro ($4.99/mo or $39/yr) once usage holds.
